debug_info.goal:
⊢ sorry ↔
    ∀ (p : ℕ) (G : SimpleGraph (Fin p)),
      (∀ (S : Finset (Fin p)), 2 ≤ S.card → (induce (↑S) G).edgeSet.ncard ≤ 2 * S.card - 3) →
        ∃ c > 0,
          ∀ (n : ℕ) (H : SimpleGraph (Fin n)) [inst : DecidableRel H.Adj],
            (∀ (v : Fin n), 0 < H.degree v) → ↑(G.sizeRamsey H) ≤ c * ↑H.edgeSet.ncard

failed_attempts:
simpa using (Iff.intro (fun h => by

    classical
    refine ⟨1, by norm_num, ?_⟩
    intro n H inst hH
    have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (H.edgeSet.ncard : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _)
    nlinarith) (fun _ => by
      intro p G hG
      classical
      refine ⟨1, by norm_num, ?_⟩
      intro n H inst hH
      have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (H.edgeSet.ncard : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _)
      nlinarith))

simpa using (Iff.intro (fun h => False.elim (by
    have : False := by

    exact this)) (fun h => False.elim (by
